mapper.insert: INSERT INTO research_proposal (owner_id, topic, ai_draft, content, status) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{topic}, #{aiDraft}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, topic, ai_draft, content, status FROM research_proposal WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, owner_id, topic, ai_draft, content, status FROM research_proposal WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE research_proposal SET content = #{content}, ai_draft = #{aiDraft}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
